# ImaginePosition enumeration

Where the Battle-Imagine cluster sits in a meter row.

```csharp
public enum ImaginePosition
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| TopRight | `0` | Trailing the top line, right of share % (today's look). |
| RightColumn | `1` | A dedicated column on the right spanning both row lines. |
| Left | `2` | Leading the row, before the rank number. |
